creator: loic-freebsd@uzea.eu
text:
Hello,

The examples in the cdk_display(3) man page are incorrect and don't work as expected (wrong colors, segfault, ...).

The attached patch make them work properly.

Fix: Attached patch

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: copy/paste the examples from cdk_display(3) man page, try to compile them and examine their behaviour
